error_signature: Unable to pull your bases, please make sure you entered the correct API key
title: Airtable plugin unable to fetch bases
symptom: The user receives an error message stating 'Unable to pull your bases, please make sure you entered the correct API key' when trying to fetch bases from Airtable.
not_this_if: The API key is correctly configured and working
root_cause: The error occurs when the user mistakenly includes the TOKEN ID instead of the actual Personal Access Token in the Airtable plugin configuration. This leads to authentication failure when attempting to access the Airtable bases.
fix_steps: Ensure you are using the actual Personal Access Token, not the TOKEN ID.
If you did not copy the token when created, generate a new Personal Access Token in Airtable.
Update the Airtable plugin configuration with the correct token.
agent_instruction: Verify and update the Airtable plugin configuration with the correct Personal Access Token.
